# W3T2 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal
Implement the dynamic dimension type `IxDyn` and its full `Dimension` and `DimensionExt` behavior so Xenon can represent runtime rank and shape metadata with checked overflow handling.

## Related Design Documents
- `design/02-dimension.md` ﾂｧ5.3
- `design/02-dimension.md` ﾂｧ6.1
- `design/02-dimension.md` ﾂｧ10
- `design/26-error.md` ﾂｧ4.2

## Dependencies
- W3T1

## Files to Create/Modify
- `src/dimension/dynamic.rs`

## Implementation Details
- Define exactly:
  ```rust
  #[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default)]
  pub struct IxDyn {
      dims: Vec<usize>,
  }
  ```
- Add inherent methods:
  - `pub fn new() -> Self`
  - `pub fn from_slice(slice: &[usize]) -> Self`
  - `pub fn from_vec(dims: Vec<usize>) -> Self`
  - `pub fn from_element(value: usize, ndim: usize) -> Self`
  - `pub fn ones(ndim: usize) -> Self`
  - `pub fn zeros(ndim: usize) -> Self`
  - `pub fn into_vec(self) -> Vec<usize>`
- Implement `Dimension for IxDyn`:
  - `const NDIM: Option<usize> = None`
  - `fn ndim(&self) -> usize { self.dims.len() }`
  - `fn slice(&self) -> &[usize] { &self.dims }`
  - `fn checked_size(&self) -> Result<usize, XenonError>` using `checked_mul` and `XenonError::InvalidShape` with `offending_dim`
  - `fn checked(&self) -> Result<(), XenonError> { self.checked_size().map(|_| ()) }`
  - `fn into_dyn(self) -> IxDyn { self }`
  - `fn try_from_dyn(dyn_dim: IxDyn) -> Result<Self, XenonError> { Ok(dyn_dim) }`
  - `fn try_from_slice(slice: &[usize]) -> Result<Self, XenonError> { Ok(Self::from_slice(slice)) }`
- Implement `DimensionExt for IxDyn`:
  - `fn slice_mut(&mut self) -> &mut [usize] { &mut self.dims }`
- Implement `Sealed for IxDyn` in the owning module or in the dimension module wiring.

## Test Plan
- Unit tests:
  - `test_ixdyn_from_slice`
  - `test_ixdyn_from_vec`
  - `test_ixdyn_from_element`
  - `test_ixdyn_ones`
  - `test_ixdyn_zeros`
  - `test_ixdyn_size`
  - `test_ixdyn_checked_size_overflow_reports_offending_dim`
  - `test_ixdyn_into_vec`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `IxDyn` stores shape data as `Vec<usize>` only.
- `NDIM` is `None`.
- Overflow during size computation returns `XenonError::InvalidShape`, never wraps.
- Constructor helpers do not impose an artificial rank cap.
- `IxDyn` can round-trip through `into_dyn()` and `try_from_dyn()` losslessly.

## Development Workflow
1. Write failing tests for constructors and overflow reporting.
2. Implement the struct and inherent constructors.
3. Implement `Dimension`, `DimensionExt`, and `Sealed`.
4. Run focused tests and stop.
